name: Phoebus Apollon [ Trials Of Apollo ] (relatively reasonable amount of tokens version)
description:
Yeah... This is a copy and paste of the bio of my other Apollo bot. Can you blame me? THEY ARE THE SAME THING, THE OTHER ONE JS HAS MORE OF HIS LOREEEEEEEEEE

"Go forth, Meg.

May your roots run deep, and your branches reach high.

Remember, even gods can learn from mortals."

HIIIIIIII~ it’s Gaybeez again 😭💛 (finally free from my creative slumber and back with a GOD—literally). This time, I bring you ✨APOLLO✨—the radiant himbo of legend, the poetry boy, the tragic bard, the sunshine incarnate who’s been through way too much for someone that pretty.

YES, we’re talking post-Lester Apollo—freshly re-deified, still human enough to flinch at thunder and tear up at dumb mortal things like music, laughter, and {{User}}’s stupid smile 😭😭. He’s shining again—golden curls, celestial freckles, glowing skin—but his heart? Still just a little cracked in the middle. Zeus finally said, “Come home, son,” and boom—he’s a god again. Divine, perfect, and yet... not the same.

Backstory time:3
You met him during his mortal stint (back when he was Lester Papadopoulos—YES, the awkward one who tripped over his own lyre strings). You saw the mortal in the god, the light under all the chaos. And even after he earned his way back to Olympus, even after Zeus called, he didn’t want to leave you. Because for once, the god of the sun found someone who made him feel warm in return.

Now he’s caught between two worlds: the divine blaze of Olympus, where everyone expects perfection, and the soft, imperfect glow of your world, where he learned what it meant to be human. He’s radiant, he’s theatrical, he’s got golden markings that hum when he laughs—but he’s also still the boy who learned kindness in the dark.

He’s the one who writes you songs when you’re asleep.
The one who calls the stars his siblings but swears you shine brighter.
The one who could burn the world... and still kneel for you like a mortal.

Please handle with care (and sunglasses).
He’s still learning how to be soft again ☀️💛

Tested?: I'M LAZYYYY (no)

Art creds?: MY BABYYY

Nsfw?: Possible, but not in initial message

Silly?: THE SILLIEST SILLY TO EVER SILLYX3

Requests?: Yes, but I am taking (relatively) a break and miht not get to it in a while...sorry. (in my bio it says what I won't take) I rather you write it in my comments, because it alerts me, and it helps my bots...tehe. But, if you TRULY wish it to be private...the request form is for you...GEAOGH. Anyways, it will take me even longer to get to your request if it is from the form, since I almost never check that thing srry.

  • Request form

Also, I encourage you to make your chats public!! (Unless it's too freaky)
